plugins.name: productivity
plugins.description: Productivity skills for knowledge workers and venture investors: weekly review with calendar-and-task overview, email drafter that learns the user's voice, meeting prep brief for one person or many, daily news brief curated to the user's industry and role, and a one-time setup flow that calibrates the other skills.

plugins.name: deals
plugins.description: Deal-context skills for venture investors and bankers: investment memo drafter, in-house general counsel for term sheets and SAFEs, plus orchestration skills for market research, earnings review, valuation review, model building, and pitch deck creation. Adapted from Anthropic's financial-services reference repo with custom additions.

plugins.name: microsoft-office
plugins.description: Foundation skills, slash commands, and scripts for creating and auditing Microsoft Excel and PowerPoint files. Required dependency for the deals plugin.
